title: CycleGoal
description: Output of L1 Meta-Orchestrator, input to L2 Task Orchestrator. Defines what a single build/evolve cycle is trying to accomplish, the budget it may spend, and the metric that decides whether it succeeded.

goal.description: One-sentence imperative statement of what to accomplish.

goal_rationale.description: Why this is the right next goal — references the signal and prior cycles.

signal_source.description: Where the impetus for this cycle came from.

risk_tier.description: 1=copy/UI tweak, 2=non-schema code, 3=new feature, 4=tenant/billing, 5=schema/pedagogy/policy. Risk tier drives auto-merge eligibility and reviewer requirements.

budget_tokens.description: Hard ceiling on model tokens this cycle may consume across all agents.

target_metric.description: The single metric whose movement decides success. Must match a metric name registered in PostHog or the outcome_metrics catalog.

target_delta.description: Expected directional change in target_metric (e.g. 0.30 = +30%, -0.10 = -10%). Sign matters; negative for drop-off-style metrics.

tenant_scope.description: Which tenants the cycle is allowed to touch. 'house' = Cusiosense house tenant only; 'pilot' = pilot schools; 'all' = every tenant.

non_goals.description: Explicit things this cycle will NOT do. Prevents scope creep by execution agents.

constraints.description: Hard constraints (e.g. 'no schema changes', 'no learner-facing copy changes', 'pedagogy spec frozen').

deadline.description: Optional hard deadline. Cycles past this without ship are aborted by L1.

lessons_to_respect.description: lessons_learned.id list the L2 + execution agents must surface in their plans/diffs.
